summary: Completed comprehensive testing of PetPulse premium pet wellness dropshipping MVP. Frontend UI is excellent and functional, chat AI integration works, but backend has timeout performance issues affecting authentication and data persistence APIs.

critical_bugs.issue: 30+ second timeout for AI responses, though functionality works
critical_bugs.impact: Slow user experience for chat interactions

critical_bugs.issue: Registration API timeouts preventing user signup completion
Login API timeouts affecting user authentication

performance_issues.issue: Consistent 30+ second timeouts on data retrieval
performance_issues.impact: Poor user experience, app appears broken

ui_bugs.issue: Console warnings about missing Description for DialogContent

integration_issues.issue: Registration form submits but times out waiting for response

working_features: Landing page loads perfectly with hero, stats, features
Navigation works correctly (Research, Pipeline, History links)
Auth modal opens and forms work properly
AI chat actually receives responses despite backend timeouts
Protected routes work correctly (Pipeline, History require auth)
Example queries populate chat input correctly

passed_tests: Landing page loads with all sections
Form fields and UI interactions work

success_percentage.backend: 57% (8/14 endpoints working, but core functionality present)

critical_fixes: Investigate and fix API timeout issues - likely database or AI integration performance
Check MongoDB connection and query performance
Optimize Claude Opus 4.6 API calls or add better timeout handling
Add loading states and retry logic for slow API calls
medium_priority: Add missing aria-describedby attributes to AuthModal DialogContent
Consider adding optimistic UI updates for better UX during slow API calls
investigation_needed: Backend performance bottleneck - all data APIs timing out at 30+ seconds
Claude AI integration may need connection pooling or caching
Consider adding Redis for session management and caching
